# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: web-api-service
    url: http://web-api.internal:8080
    routes:
      - name: web-api-route
        paths:
          - /api
        strip_path: true
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
                - https://admin.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - PATCH
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Accept
                - Origin
                - X-Requested-With
                - X-API-Key
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-Id
                - X-RateLimit-Limit
                - X-RateLimit-Remaining
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
              preflight_continue: false
          - name: key-auth
            config:
              key_names:
                - apikey
                - x-api-key
              hide_credentials: true
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 100
              hour: 1000
              policy: local

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Accept
        - Origin
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-API-Key
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-Id
        - X-RateLimit-Limit
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
        - x-api-key
      hide_credentials: true
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 1000
      hour: 10000
      policy: local

consumers:
  - username: web-client
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: web-client-api-key-12345
  - username: admin-client
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: admin-client-api-key-67890
